Description: Buff next action's Str attack, heal and protect l by 5X% (Consumed on use)

Reduce damage received from one action by 30%, 40% if upgrade

For each stack, Bleed debuff has a 5% chance to bypass your Bleed immunity.Trigger X extra Bleed in the end of the turn.
Increase Injury Stacks received by X and Injury stacks won't decrease in the end of turn
Protect user from any direct damage X number of times where X is the current character LV.
Double any damage received after calculation, reduce healing and protect received by half
Next action's skills will use a random stat as multiplier instead of the one they originally have.  Actions become unpredictable. (Remove 1 stack on trigger)
50% action will fail and recover 10% HP (Remove 1 stack on trigger)
The next action will ignore the following debuffs: Paralysis, Slack, Confuse, Injury, Blind, Dizzy, Depress and boost attack, heal, protect by 20% (Remove 1 stack on trigger)
Debuff next action's Str attack, heal and protect l by 5X% (Consumed on use)
Debuff next action's Agi attack, heal and protect  by 5X% (Consumed on use)
Debuff next action's Int attack, heal and protect by 5X% (Consumed on use)
Debuff next action's MaxHP attack, heal and protect by 5X% (Consumed on use)
Increase damage dealt by 0.5X%. (Remove at turn end)
Reduce direct damage received by 1X%. (Remove at turn start)
With 25 or more stacks of Venom, the Venom damage effect will be triggered at the end of each action, and 10 Venom stacks will be reduced upon triggering.
Remove one stack of Restrain and negate the activation of a reflect or counter effect. With 25 or more stacks, take 50% of the counter damage.

With 25 or more stacks of Insane, there is a 50% chance that the next action's skill will be used on the wrong target. With 35 stacks of Insane, this effect is guaranteed. Activating this will remove 10 stacks of Insane.
Use the next 0 AP cost ability on hand twice or increase the next Overload ability uses by 1 (Consumed on use. Enemy monsters will use any of their next ability twice)
With 10 or more stacks, next Gamble skill execution x2, x3 if 20 stacks. Consume on effect trigger.
When received Str damage, suffer X20% damage based on the attacker's Str, remove on effect trigger.
When received Agi damage, suffer X20% damage based on the attacker's Agi, remove on effect trigger.
When received Int damage, suffer X20% damage based on the attacker's Int, remove on effect trigger.
When received MaxHP damage, suffer X2.5%/X5% damage based on the attacker's MaxHP, remove on effect trigger.

For each stack, Burn debuff has a 3% chance to bypass your Burn immunity. Whenever one uses an ability with the Fire element (either from the ability itself or from the character's active element), they suffer 5% damage for each stack of sigils, based on the opponent's strongest attribute. (Removed at the end of turn)

For each stack, Chill debuff has a 3% chance to bypass your Chill immunity. Whenever one uses an ability with the Water element (either from the ability itself or from the character's active element), they suffer 5% damage for each stack of sigils, based on the opponent's strongest attribute. (Removed at the end of turn)

For each stack, Paralysis debuff has a 3% chance to bypass your Paralysis immunity. Whenever one uses an ability with the Thunder element (either from the ability itself or from the character's active element), they suffer 5% damage for each stack of sigils, based on the opponent's strongest attribute. (Removed at the end of turn)

For each stack, Seed debuff has a 3% chance to bypass your Seed immunity. Whenever one uses an ability with the Earth element (either from the ability itself or from the character's active element), they suffer 5% damage for each stack of sigils, based on the opponent's strongest attribute. (Removed at the end of turn)

For each stack, Dizzy debuff has a 3% chance to bypass your Dizzy immunity. Whenever one uses an ability with the Wind element (either from the ability itself or from the character's active element), they suffer 5% damage for each stack of sigils, based on the opponent's strongest attribute. (Removed at the end of turn)

For each stack, Blind debuff has a 3% chance to bypass your Blind immunity. Whenever one uses an ability with the Light element (either from the ability itself or from the character's active element), they suffer 5% damage for each stack of sigils, based on the opponent's strongest attribute. (Removed at the end of turn)

For each stack, Depress debuff has a 3% chance to bypass your Depress immunity. Whenever one uses an ability with the Dark element (either from the ability itself or from the character's active element), they suffer 5% damage for each stack of sigils, based on the opponent's strongest attribute. (Removed at the end of turn)
Any debuff and status effect will have X10% to bypass your immunity. (Remove on turn end)
For one action, cancel any healing effects and suffer X10% damage based on the healing value. (Remove on trigger)

Store 50% of the direct damage received (Not include “Farewell” damage). At the start of your next turn, deal the stored damage to the enemy. (Stored damage cannot exceed your maxhp. Removed on activation)

(Player) You can't discard ability for +1AP, nor using any non direct attack ability / (Enemy) Replace the first X action with random direct attack abilities. (Max 2 stacks. Lose 1 stack on using an ability)
Absorb 20% of MaxHP damage, calculate before Protect. If the last hit of attack exceed the remaining value, the damage cap at that remaining value
Cut MaxHP by 40% X times, where X is the number of stacks.  Instantly die upon gaining the max stack. (This buff is permanent, and MaxHP cannot be reduced below 1)

Your next X dice rolls will result in either a 1 or 2. On Max stacks, reverse the effect of Rage and Instinct (Max 10 stacks. The number of stacks x2 at the end of each turn. One stack will be lost for each dice roll made.)
Boost X next ability's attack, heal and protect gain by 50%
When you have 7 stacks, increase damage dealt by 50% for one action. (Consumed on activation, [End-Of-Turn] passives will also consume this buff)
While this buff is active, change your current monster's race to Humanoid. (Removed upon swapping to a different monster)
While this buff is active, change your current monster's race to Beast. (Removed upon swapping to a different monster)
While this buff is active, change your current monster's race to Inorganic. (Removed upon swapping to a different monster)
While this buff is active, change your current monster's race to Spirit. (Removed upon swapping to a different monster)

After each action, suffer damage equal to your level multiplied by the current debuff stacks, and lose 1 stack Dehydration, but it will always have at least 1 stack remaining. When this effect is removed by a Water attack, gain 2 Water Vulnerable for each Dehydration stack removed.(Water Reactant)

At the end of the turn, lose 15% of your maximum Protect per stack; also lose 1 stack of Rupture, but it will always have at least 1 stack remaining.  When this effect is removed by an Earth effect, remove a number of random defense buffs equal to the Rupture stack count. (Earth Reactant)

Gain 2 random debuff per stack upon receiving this debuff. Panic effects always trigger regardless of HP%. Dark damage received increases by 4% per stack. Lose 1 stack at the end of each turn, but retain at least 1 stack. (Dark Reactant)

This debuff alternates between Cation and Anion based on the turn number. Cation increases both damage dealt and received by 3%, while Anion decreases both damage dealt and received by 3%. Loses 1 stack at the end, but retain at least 1 stack. When this effect is removed by a Thunder effect, the remover gains 3 stacks of Thunder Charge per Polar Charge stack.(Thunder Reactant)

Increase direct damage receives by 2.5% per stack.  Lose 1 at the end of each turn, but retain at least 1 stack. When this effect is removed by a Fire effect, convert the same number of stacks into Burn. For any excess Burn stacks beyond its stack limit, convert them into 2 stacks of Fire vulnerable for every Burn stacks. (Fire Reactant)

Increase VRI damage receives by 4% per stack. Lose 1 stack of Dust whenever a VRI effect is triggered, but retain at least 1 stack.  When this effect is removed by a Wind effect, convert the same number of stacks into Bleed. (Wind Reactant)

Upon receiving this debuff, the opponent gains 2 random buffs per stack. Take 5% more raw damage per stack. When the user gains a buff, the opponent gains 1 stack of the same buff, and lose 1 stack of Luminesce.  When this effect is removed by a Light effect,  the remover gains Light Element equal to stacks removed. (Light Reactant)

Player: your next job swap/ability use has a 50% chance of doing nothing. 
Enemy: one of their next actions is replaced with "Dozing" ability.
If race match, 25% more damage for enemy, 25% more heal on self
If race match, 25% more damage for enemy, 25% more heal on self
If race match, 25% more damage for enemy, 25% more heal on self
If race match, 25% more damage for enemy, 25% more heal on self
Add 50%, 100% if upgraeded life steal on ability's attack.
Boost 2X% damage/heal, X = Strength Combo Counter (Max 100%)
Boost 1X% damage/heal, X = Agility Combo Counter (Max 100%)
Boost 1X% damage/heal, X = Intelligence Combo Counter (Max 100%)
Boost 2X% damage/heal, X = MaxHP Combo Counter (Max 100%)
Deal 20%/30% extra damage for enemy's Burn or Earth element, boost damage and heal by 3% for each stack of corresponding element buff on self
Deal 20%/30% extra damage for enemy's Chill or Fire element, boost damage and heal by 3% for each stack of corresponding element buff on self
Deal 20%/30% extra damage for enemy's distinct Paralysis or Water element,boost damage and heal by 3% for each stack of corresponding element buff on self
Deal 20%/30% extra damage for enemy's Seeded or Thunder element, boost damage and heal by 3% for each stack of corresponding element buff on self
Deal 20%/30% extra damage for enemy's Dizzy or Earth element, boost damage and heal by 3% for each stack of corresponding element buff on self
Deal 20%/30% extra damage for enemy's Blinded or Dark element, boost damage and heal by 3% for each stack of corresponding element buff on self
Deal 20%/30% extra damage for enemy's Depressd or Light element, boost damage and heal by 3% for each stack of corresponding element buff on self
Add 15X% more damage/heal for every turn passed
Add 10X% more damage/heal for each time this ability used
Add 8X% more damage/heal for each unique buff
Add 12X% more damage/heal for each unique debuff
Consume X AP and repeat this ability X times, X is the remaining AP. (Enemy monsters gain extra 2 times)
Discard all hand and boost this ability attack and heal by 100% times per discard / Enemy monsters consume all AP instead and gain extra 2 times increase
Remove this skill from this combat
Cannot discard this skill for action
If status combo is not zero, ignore the combo effects gain by this ability, increase the combo counter by 1, increased by 2 if upgraded
This ability will excuted itself in the end of turn with half damage, heal and protect. (As hand abiliy: No AP cost. As hero ability: Cooldown -1.)
This ability will excuted itself on job swap with half damage, heal and protect. (As hand abiliy: No AP cost. As hero ability: Cooldown -1.)

Roll a dice: Side 1,2 = Ability won't be executed, Side 3,4 = Normal Effect, Side 5 = Use the ability 2 times, Side 6 = Use the ability 3 times. 
For enemy randomly use abilities 1 to 3 times

The percentage of user's HP will affect the damage and healing of this ability.  (1.5% change per 1% of HP)
HP < 10%: Damage and healing are increased by 60%.
HP = 50%: Damage and healing are normal.
HP > 90%: Damage and Healing are decreased by 60%.

The percentage of user's HP will affect the damage and healing of this ability. (1% change per 1% of HP)
HP > 90%: Damage and Healing are increased by 40%.
HP = 50%: Damage and healing are normal.
HP < 10%: Damage and healing are decreased by 40%.
When the element of the attack matches the opponent's elemental vulnerable, remove the correspond vulnerable and further increase the damage by 5% per stack
When the opponent receives damage from this skill, remove the first trigger effect of Second Chance, Invulnerable or Resurrection.
Player: If this skill kills the opponent, gain random amount of currencies. Enemy: Steal random amount of currencies from the player
If user HP is below 50%, use the skill twice but half the effect stacks on the skill. (The effect stacks won't go below 1)

This skill has [Exhaust] effect, but without the hero ability's extra cd. (Player Only) If user has Summoner's Gift passive, temporary change the current hero into one of the following heroes until the start of next turn: [Summons]
During this run, for each time the player rolls a dice side of 1, increase the damage and healing of this ability by 0.5%. (Max boost: 250%)
Gain a Do buff after succesfully used, if you already have another two of the Do Re Mi buffs, trigger a special effects based on the buffs you have and remove all of them.
Gain a Re buff after succesfully used, if you already have another two of the Do Re Mi buffs, trigger a special effects based on the buffs you have and remove all of them.
Gain a Mi buff after succesfully used, if you already have another two of the Do Re Mi buffs, trigger a special effects based on the buffs you have and remove all of them.
Remove all Slack debuffs on the opponent, for each stacks removed, boost current ability damage by 50%.
Made of Silver.
Made of Gold.
Made of Crystal.
This skill has [Exhaust] effect. Reduces your Bad Mood debuff stacks by half upon use.

This ability can be used 3 times each turn, and each use will increase the AP cost by 1. On the last use, the ability will be exhausted. If the ability is used at least once, discarding it for AP will also exhaust it.
The ability with the same name can only be used once per turn. If it is a Hero ability, it will have 1 extra turn of cooldown.

Upon receiving this debuff, remove all Fire elements you possess. For every 2 element removed, gain an extra stack of debuff. This debuff will be removed whenever the user applies a positive Fire buff or heal on themselves, or receives Fire elemental damage.

Upon receiving this debuff, remove all Water elements you possess. For every 2 element removed, gain an extra stack of debuff. This debuff will be removed whenever the user applies a positive Water buff or heal on themselves, or receives Water elemental damage.

Upon receiving this debuff, remove all Thunder elements you possess. For every 2 element removed, gain an extra stack of debuff. This debuff will be removed whenever the user applies a positive Thunder buff or heal on themselves, or receives Thunder elemental damage.

Upon receiving this debuff, remove all Earth elements you possess. For every 2 element removed, gain an extra stack of debuff. This debuff will be removed whenever the user applies a positive Earth buff or heal on themselves, or receives Earth elemental damage.

Upon receiving this debuff, remove all Wind elements you possess. For every 2 element removed, gain an extra stack of debuff. This debuff will be removed whenever the user applies a positive Wind buff or heal on themselves, or receives Wind elemental damage.

Upon receiving this debuff, remove all Light elements you possess. For every 2 element removed, gain an extra stack of debuff. This debuff will be removed whenever the user applies a positive Light buff or heal on themselves, or receives Light elemental damage.

Upon receiving this debuff, remove all Dark elements you possess. For every 2 element removed, gain an extra stack of debuff. This debuff will be removed whenever the user applies a positive Dark buff or heal on themselves, or receives Dark elemental damage.
